synthetic_glucodex_golden.node-export.js.note: ADDED 2026-07-12 (CPAP-REAL-CORPUS-2026-07-11-BRIEF §P9, resolving §M5) — a COMMITTED, content-addressed equivalence input for GlucoDex. Before P9, every node's equivalence input was a REAL recording, hence gitignored, hence absent on a fresh clone: ALL EIGHT compute()-equivalence legs SKIPPED in CI. The suite's strongest correctness gate — the GATE-C surface that catches a code change which moved a fixture's OUTPUT — therefore ran only on the maintainer's machine, and a regression that moved an export would have gone green through CI. This input is SYNTHETIC (tools/make-synthetic-inputs.mjs): the vendor FORMAT is reproduced exactly, the DATA never is — closed-form, physiologically plausible waveforms containing no recording of any person and no device identifier. Deterministic (no RNG, no Date.now()), so re-running the generator reproduces it byte-for-byte and inputHashes stay stable. It ADDS to the real-recording leg (which still runs locally and exercises genuine vendor quirks); it does not replace it. REGENERATE the input and this golden together whenever the export shape changes.

synthetic_glucodex_gap_golden.node-expor.note: ADDED 2026-07-14 (FIXTURE-VERIFICATION-GATE-2026-07-14 §4 — the GlucoDex adversarial twin that DEEP-AUDIT-FOLLOWUPS-2026-07-12 §A never shipped). The CLEAN synthetic Lingo trips NO FLAG.GAP_LONG, so the whole long-gap path was unexercised by any COMMITTED input — which is precisely how DEEP-AUDIT-2026-07-14 §1 could declare itself EXPORT-INERT on the clean golden's evidence, move the REAL Lingo night's export, and ship: the real-recording equiv leg SKIPS wherever uploads/ is absent (CI, and the executing session's machine). This input is a synthetic 3-day Lingo CSV with a 14 h sensor-change gap (readings stop on the post-lunch decay at 143 mg/dL, resume 14 h later at 100), so clean() draws 168 GAP_LONG cells that are NEVER measured glucose. It is COMMITTED, so it runs in CI with no corpus. It SEPARATES THE TWO CODES: current code excludes the drawn cells (daypart n = 168+216+169+144 = 697); pre-§1 code counted them as measured (n = 216+216+216+216 = 864). Generated by re-running the real modules via tools/regen-glucodex-goldens.mjs (GlucoDex.compute({text}) — the seam the equiv gate drives), never hand-edited.
